meta.title: Broken tooth with active pain
meta.description: Caller fractured a molar while eating — same-day eval expected.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Thank you for calling Cascade Family Dentistry. This is Aly. How can I help you?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Hi, my name is Jake Miller. I have a broken tooth from eating popcorn and it really hurts.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: I'm sorry to hear that. What's a good phone number to reach you?

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Which tooth is it, and when did it happen?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Upper right molar — it happened at lunch today. The edge is sharp and every time I bite down it aches.
